_status: experimental — Antigravity 2.0 (launched 19 May 2026) has not yet published an open plugin manifest spec. This file mirrors the Gemini CLI Extensions format that Antigravity's `agy plugin import gemini` converter accepts. When Antigravity publishes a v2-native plugin manifest spec, this file will be updated to match. See docs/cross-platform-install.md for the current install workflow.
name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline — 10-phase workflow, 19 skills, 13 agents, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, C2PA provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance), May 2026 AEO/GEO reality.
